scummvm_reference.struct: TIM struct with kCountFuncs=10 functions, kWSASlots=6 animation slots
scummvm_reference.AVTL_chunk: Array of uint16 LE values. First N values are function entry-point offsets into the array. Instructions at those offsets: [length][delay][opcode][params...]. Opcode is ip[2]&0xFF. Up to 10 concurrent functions.
scummvm_reference.execution: TIMInterpreter dispatches opcodes to game-specific opcode tables (intro/outro/ingame)
